label: CoinGecko
description: Fetch real-time crypto prices, market data, and on-chain analytics from CoinGecko's public and Pro APIs.

form.title: Connect CoinGecko
form.subtitle: Pull live crypto prices, market cap rankings, and on-chain analytics from CoinGecko.

methods.label: Pro API Key
methods.description: Paste a CoinGecko Pro or Demo API key for higher rate limits and access to premium endpoints. Generate one in the Developer Dashboard in under a minute.
methods.how_to:
## Get a CoinGecko API Key

CoinGecko offers a free Demo key (generous rate limits) and paid Pro keys. Both are obtained from the same Developer Dashboard.

### Steps

1. Sign up or log in at [www.coingecko.com](https://www.coingecko.com).
2. Open the [Developer Dashboard](https://www.coingecko.com/en/developers/dashboard).
3. Click **+ Add New Key** (or **Create Demo API Key** if you're on the free plan).
4. Give the key a name like `Anton` and click **Create**.
5. Copy the key from the table — it starts with `CG-`.
6. Paste it into the **API Key** field below.

### Notes

- Demo keys are free and cover most price + market data endpoints. Pro keys unlock on-chain analytics, NFT data, and higher call volumes.
- The key is shown at any time in the dashboard, so you can retrieve it if lost.
- To upgrade a Demo key to Pro, subscribe to a plan and a new key will be issued — update it here.
- See [CoinGecko API docs](https://docs.coingecko.com/reference/introduction) for full endpoint coverage by tier.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Demo or Pro API key from the CoinGecko Developer Dashboard. Starts with CG-.

fields.name: api_tier
fields.label: API Tier
fields.description: Select the tier matching your key. Demo keys hit api.coingecko.com; Pro keys use pro-api.coingecko.com.

methods.label: Public API (No Key)
methods.description: Use CoinGecko's public API with no authentication. Free and instant to set up, but heavily rate-limited — suitable for light, infrequent queries only.
methods.how_to:
## CoinGecko Public API (No Authentication)

CoinGecko exposes a public REST API that requires no API key. No sign-up needed — just point Anton at the endpoint and go.

### Steps

1. No setup required. Click **Submit** to save.
2. Anton will call `https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3` without an API key header.

### Gotchas

- The public tier allows roughly **5–15 calls per minute** depending on server load. Exceeding this returns a 429 error.
- Several endpoints (on-chain analytics, NFT data, historical OHLCV) are **not available** without at least a Demo key.
- If you hit rate limits frequently, switch to the **Pro API Key** method — a free Demo key is sufficient and takes under a minute to generate.
- See [CoinGecko rate limit docs](https://docs.coingecko.com/reference/common-errors-rate-limit) for details.

fields.name: acknowledged_limits
fields.label: I understand this tier is heavily rate-limited
fields.description: Check to confirm you're aware of the public API rate limits. Consider a free Demo key for better reliability.
